title: Muffin's Slime Golem
description: Add Slime Golem to Minecraft. A good ally for finding Slime Chunks!
body:
![logo](https://imgur.com/BwK9K8t.png)
Add Slime Golem to Minecraft. A good ally for finding Slime Chunks!



*** # Slime Golem Adds Slime Golems to Minecraft. A good ally for finding Slime Chunks! ## Slime Golem - Place a Carved Pumpkin on a Slime Block or a Packed Slime Block to build a Slime Golem. - Slime Golems are aggressive toward all hostile mobs except for Slimes. - Once a Slime Golem enters a slime chunk, they will produce Slime Algae on the ground, similar to Snow Golems. - Using Shears on them will take their pumpkin off. - Using Honey Comb on them will stop them from producing Slime Algae when they are in a slime chunk, visually covering them in honey. - Using a Slime Ball on a honey-covered Slime Golem will clean the honey off, allowing it to produce Slime Algae in slime chunks again.
(A Slime Golem covered in honey with pumpkin off) ## Block - Packed Slime Block - Used as the base for a Soul Campfire to disable Slime Chunks! (for those annoyed by slime chunks). - Can bounce on them just like on a Slime Block but does not stick when used with pistons. - Block.
- Slime Algae - When destroyed with Shears or Silk Touch tools, it drops Slime Algae. Otherwise, it has a low chance to drop a Slime Ball.
- Occasionally spawns in Slime Chunks below Y=40.
## Item - Slime Pie - Restores 2 Hunger and 1 Saturation. - Causes Bounce effect for 20 seconds - Has a 50% chance to cause Nausea for 5 seconds.
# Having Bugs? Report the bug [here](https://github.com/FireMuffin303/SlimeGolem/issues)! --- (Description revision by : Keaton42)
